sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content:
The Spa is located in the southwest area of the Railroad .
By entering the Spa, passing through the changing room, and remaining stationary in the pool, energy and health are restored at 10 points per second.
There are two changing rooms - one for women and one for men. It is possible to enter the changing room opposite to the player 's gender, but only after attempting to enter several times in quick succession from the pool area.
While passing through the covered path from the locker room to the pool, the player is forced into walking and changes into a swimsuit whose color is the same as the player's chosen pants color. Prismatic pants result in a prismatic swimsuit. Undershorts result in a white swimsuit.

sections.heading: Secret
sections.content:
It is possible to fish in the water outside the spa, except in Winter when the water is frozen. After reading Secret Note #25 , the first time fishing there...
If the player has not found Secret Note #25 or has already solved it, a painting titled 'Vista' can be obtained while fishing. Trash is the only other item that can be caught.

sections.heading: Livin' Off The Land Tip
sections.content: On the 15th of Summer (odd years), Livin' Off The Land airs an episode about the Spa:

sections.heading: Gallery
sections.content:
- Entrance
- Penny's locker
- Abigail's locker
- Alex's locker
- Women's Locker Room
- Men's Locker Room
- Interior

sections.heading: Trivia
sections.content: It is possible to access the spa before unlocking the railroad by using the sword-swing glitch to get outside the map and walk around to the trigger area behind the blocked path. Unfortunately, this will cause the character to be stuck in the area as trying to leave via the normal exit will cause them to get stuck in the rocks blocking the path.

sections.heading: History
sections.content:
- 1.4 : Added fishing in water outside spa. Removed bugs allowing players to retain the spa's healing and/or the swimsuit outfit outside of the spa.
- 1.5 : 'Vista' can now be caught in the water outside of the spa. Reintroduced bug that allows the player to retain the swimsuit outside the spa by dying in the changing hallway.
- 1.6 : Re-fixed bug that allows the player to retain the swimsuit outside the spa by dying in the changing hallway.
- 1.6.9 : Fixed bug limiting energy regeneration to the player's normal energy level when the player has an active Max Energy buff.

rows: The player will catch an Ornate Necklace , which can be given to Caroline for 50 Friendship points with her or to Abigail for 100 friendship points with her.
